title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Speciality Restaurants

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Speciality Restaurants
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants:
Speciality Restaurants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
